title: lophodium filix-mas
intro: Lophodium filix-mas, also known as the fragile fern or lophodium fern, is a type of plant species belonging to the family of lycopodiophyta, a group of ancient and primitive vascular plants. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Lophodium filix-mas include its anti-inflammatory and antiviral properties, which can help to boost the immune system and reduce the risk of infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of teas, infusions, or dried powders, and is sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
